About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data reveals two exceptional performers at the top of the momentum rankings, though with notably different risk profiles. LINC (rank 1, score 96.2) shows the most balanced strength with consistent gains across all timeframes—1-year return of 153.83% with all four major moving average gates passed—and demonstrates remarkable resilience with a bad_spy_score of 2.49, meaning it holds up well even on down market days. In contrast, TNGX (rank 2) displays extreme but volatile performance, posting a stunning 804.33% one-year return but only achieving 4 out of 5 ratio passes (versus LINC's perfect 5) and showing a concerning -1.37% single-day decline despite its massive longer-term gains. The key distinction is consistency: LINC's ratio metrics score 99.84 compared to what appears to be a lower ratio pass rate for TNGX, suggesting LINC's momentum is more predictable and sustained across different timeframe transitions. Both stocks trade above all major moving averages and significantly outpace SPY and QQQ performance, but LINC's cleaner momentum signal (-0.31) and superior resilience on bad market days make it the more reliable momentum candidate by the dashboard's scoring methodology.
